description: VoidLink behavioral profile for Malscope sandbox/dynamic analysis integration

execution_phases.name: process_masquerade
execution_phases.description: VoidLink forks a child process and renames it via prctl(PR_SET_NAME) to a kernel thread name to blend in with legitimate system processes.

syscalls.name: fork
syscalls.note: Creates child process for sequence execution

syscalls.name: prctl
syscalls.note: PR_SET_NAME=15, sets name to [kworker/0:0] or similar

indicators: User-space process with PID > 1 has kernel thread name

execution_phases.name: c2_beacon
execution_phases.description: Child process opens a TCP socket and connects to the C2 server, then receives the payload.
indicators: Kernel-named process making outbound TCP connections
HTTP traffic with rotating Content-Type headers
Base64-encoded content in image/png or CSS responses

execution_phases.name: fileless_execution
execution_phases.description: VoidLink writes received payload to an anonymous memory-backed file (memfd_create) and executes it via execveat with AT_EMPTY_PATH, leaving no trace on disk.
indicators: Process ancestry: /proc/<pid>/exe points to memfd: path
No file on disk corresponding to running process

execution_phases.name: plugin_loading
execution_phases.description: VoidLink's beacon loop loads ET_REL ELF .o plugin files from a local directory and executes them via a custom ELF relocator. Plugins run: recon, cred_harvest, persist.
indicators: mmap with PROT_READ|PROT_EXEC on .o file content
mprotect setting executable permissions on mmap'd region
ET_REL ELF objects (type=1) present in filesystem
Rapid read() calls on multiple .o files from same process

execution_phases.name: edr_enumeration
execution_phases.description: VoidLink scans /proc/*/comm to detect security products and adjusts its beaconing profile accordingly (aggressive if no EDR, paranoid if EDR detected).
indicators: Process scanning 12+ security tool names in under 1 second

artifacts.note: memfd execution — process exe link points here

notable_absence: No binary written to disk (fileless execution)
No persistence files created (benign mode: enumeration only)

syscall_sequence_fingerprint.description: The definitive VoidLink detection sequence — all 8 syscalls in this order within 30 seconds is a confirmed VoidLink indicator
